revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-210

Alternative term: Rocks

An isolated rocky formation or a single large stone, usually one constituting a danger to navigation.


Note: In French such a formation when totally submerged is called a roche.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Rock}}
